pricebookId.description: REQUIRED. Pricebook2 Id from find_Pricebook. Use this before creating SBQQ Quote Lines to get valid pricebookEntryId/productId.

productName.description: Product name to search (partial match). Use this OR productCode. E.g. 'Solar Panel', 'License'.

productCode.description: Product code (exact). Use this OR productName. E.g. 'SOLAR-1', 'ENT-LIC'.
